detail.title: [US] Partner Growth Center
detail.content:
# **Introduction** The Partner Growth Task Center (Partner - TTSPC) is an exclusive task management platform for partner users. Its entrance is located on the homepage of the "Growth Center" within the Partner Center, divided into two modules: "Task" and "Growth Task". This center is only accessible to partner roles (Seller Service- *TSP/* Creator Service*- CAP*/ Creator Matchmaking- *TAP*) logging in through main accounts or authorized sub-accounts. # **What Are the Benefits?** Centralized task hub in Partner Center enables easy access to policies and tasks, paired with real-time progress tracking and self-service. Gain a partner conversion rate and an expanded base of high-quality partners to strengthen its ecosystem, increase total agency GMV and form a scalable, modular framework that supports future expansion. --- # **Step by Step Guide** ## **How to check your tasks?** **Entrance:** * Partner Center - Growth Center - Home Page - Task * Partner Center - Growth Center - Growth Center - Growth Task **Permission Control**: * Partner roles only (Seller Service- TSP*/* Creator Service- CAP/ Creator Matchmaking- TAP) * Login via main accounts/authorized sub-accounts.

## **How to understand task details？**
![Image](https://p16-arcosite-sg.ibyteimg.com/tos-alisg-i-k9wyc2ijk0-sg/de6de49edf664a298f50b8671529eea5~tplv-k9wyc2ijk0-image.image)
Home Page
![Image](https://p16-arcosite-sg.ibyteimg.com/tos-alisg-i-k9wyc2ijk0-sg/f9c56812462f4ce897c59e51eeb151b0~tplv-k9wyc2ijk0-image.image)
Growth Task
* Task Name: Task name * Task Status：Not started, In progress, Completed, Expired * Task reward situation: the detail of task incentive * Task start and end time: The task start and end time * Task Objectives/Completion Rules (multiple) * Task Description: Task description text * Task Attachment URL: Task Jump URL displayed * Task Progress: Tasks after being claimed will display their progress.
